
# Consciousness-First Theories

## Overview

This chapter explores:

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Main Concepts

### 

### 

### 

## Notes

Add references, figures, equations, case studies, and discussions here.


## Suggested Sections

### Panpsychism

### Cosmopsychism

### Idealism

### Analytic Idealism

### Participatory Universe

### Taheri Consciousness Theory

## Comparative Analysis Table

| Theory | Consciousness Fundamental? | Relation to Matter | Testability |
|---|---|---|---|
| Panpsychism |  |  |  |
| IIT |  |  |  |
| Idealism |  |  |  |
